BPM Method - Goal Setting Exercise



When setting your goals it’s important to start with what’s important to your business then work through to what’s important for your advertising goals.



Use the KPI levers training and spreadsheet from The BPM Method training portal to help plan your goals.



You can use your own copy of the KPI levers spreadsheet to set goals, or copy them below for future reference.



To use this document choose File > Make a copy and edit your own copy.



This document is intended to help you plan your goals and create the mindset of planning before attacking your growth plans, as we do in our agency and own ad accounts.







Data Period:

(eg Monthly/Daily that relates to the numbers below)

Ad Spend Target/Available

(eg $1000)

Revenue Goal

(eg $5000)

Target Return on ad Spend (ROAS)

(eg 3.5x)

Target Cost per Acquisition (CPA)

(eg $25)

Target Average Order Value (AOV)

(eg $87.50)

Target Funnel Conversion Rate

(eg 3%)

Target Sales

(eg 30)

Target Traffic

(eg 1000)

Target CPC

(eg $1.00)

Target CPM

(eg $20)

Target CTR

(eg 2%)
